reviews.comment:
Solo 3 estaciones de servicio YPF en San Luis Ciudad concurro, OPESSA, ACA Y BELLA VISTA. por la atención, el servicio y la amabilidad de sus empleados. Desde que poseo vehículos motor desde el año 1972.SOLAMENTE USO Y USARÉ productos YPF en mis 4 vehiculos, 2 motocicletas y 2 automotores.

(Translated by Google)
I only frequent three YPF service stations in San Luis City: OPESSA, ACA, and BELLA VISTA. I appreciate the attention, service, and friendliness of their employees. Since owning motor vehicles in 1972, I ONLY USE AND WILL ONLY USE YPF products in my four vehicles: two motorcycles and two cars.

reviews.comment:
Excelente el kiosko de las estación de servicios. Pides desayunar, merendar, excelentes medialunas, criollitos y tostados.. Buenisima atencion

(Translated by Google)
The gas station kiosk is excellent. They have breakfast, afternoon tea, and great croissants, pastries, and toast. Excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Siempre y cuando no te agarre el cambio de turno de los empleados del surtidor, que tenes que esperara más de 45 minutos, ni que necesites usar el baño, porque aunque te mueras no te lo prestan.

(Translated by Google)
As long as you don't get caught up in the gas station employee's shift change, which means you'll have to wait more than 45 minutes, or need to use the bathroom, because even if you're dying, they won't let you use it.
